name: Presidio Property Trust Inc. 9.375% Series D Cumulative Redeemable Perpetual Preferred Stock $0.01 par value per share
summary: Presidio Property Trust Inc. is a real estate investment trust (REIT) that owns, operates, and manages commercial properties. The company's 9.375% Series D Cumulative Redeemable Perpetual Preferred Stock represents a specific class of ownership with associated dividend rights. Presidio Property Trust is based in San Diego, California.
